title: Moar Bosses
description: Moar Bosses adds 7 types of randomly spawning bosses into your Minecraft world. Each boss has 3-5 unique and crazy magical attacks, and drop cores that can be used to craft magic wands. The bosses have custom textures using Optifine or Reselect or CET.
body:
Moar Bosses

Moar Bosses adds 7 types of randomly spawning boss into your Minecraft world. Each boss has 3-5 unique and crazy magical attacks, and drop cores that can be used to craft magic wands. The bosses have custom textures that rely on Optifine or the Reselect Mod (either work). Spawn rates are completely configurable.

The datapack REQUIRES this Library, as well as this Resource Pack.

Learn more from this video:

So, what do the bosses do?

  • Fire:
    • Spawns in the Nether, except for Warp Forest biomes. Attacks with fire and lava based attacks.

  • Water:
    • Spawns in the following biomes: river, beach, ice_spikes, snowy_plains, snowy_taiga, warm_ocean, ocean, lukewarm_ocean, deep_ocean, deep_lukewarm_ocean, deep_frozen_ocean, deep_cold_ocean, cold_ocean. Attacks with water, bubbles, and ice attacks.

  • Earth:
    • Spawns in earthy biomes: forest, plains, stony_shore, swamp, taiga, taiga_mountains. Attacks by throwing boulders and causing earthquakes.

  • Air:
    • Spawns above y = 130 in the following biomes: frozen_peaks, jagged_peaks, meadow, snowy_slopes, stony_peaks, grove. Attacks mainly with knockback air attacks.

  • Metal:
    • Spawns anywhere below y = 0. Attacks with metal spikes pulled from the ground.

  • Lightning:
    • Spawns in desert biomes: badlands, desert, eroded_badlands, savanna, savanna_plateau. Attacks with various forms of lightning.

  • Chicken:
    • Spawns when a boss spawns near a chicken in a plains biome. Shoots deadly exploding chickens at you.
